queue.task: Review yesterday's depth findings, prioritize Saturday goals. String truncation bug = data corruption — top priority.
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday: 7 bugs fixed, pattern = path-not-handled. Queue priorities confirmed — string truncation (data corruption) stays #1. No queue changes.

queue.goal: Fix HenryDB string truncation bug (TOAST or error on oversized values)
queue.summary: Root cause: disk-manager PAGE_SIZE=4096 vs page.js PAGE_SIZE=32768. FileBackedHeap.insert silently returns slotIdx=-1 for rows >4076 bytes. Plan: increase disk PAGE_SIZE to 32KB, add error check on insert failure.

queue.task: Add oversized-row error in FileBackedHeap.insert() + increase disk PAGE_SIZE to 32KB + add TOAST-like error for extreme rows
queue.summary: Fixed string truncation: increased disk PAGE_SIZE 4096→32768, added error on oversized rows. Root cause was PAGE_SIZE mismatch between disk-manager (4096) and page.js (32768). All persistence tests pass.

queue.task: Write tests for string truncation fix (boundary cases, persistence roundtrip)
queue.summary: Wrote 7 regression tests for string truncation fix: PAGE_SIZE check, in-memory large strings, persistent storage up to 30KB, close/reopen roundtrip, oversized error, old boundary cases, multiple large strings. All pass.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed, scratch notes captured for string truncation fix, dashboard healthy.

queue.task: Reflect on string fix. Review TODO Normal items — pick next HenryDB priority.
queue.summary: Reflected on string fix: 2-source constant problem. Lesson: define constants in ONE place. Removed string truncation from TODO (fixed). Next priority: bug batch (EXPLAIN, WAL syncMode, LIMIT subquery).

queue.goal: HenryDB bug batch: EXPLAIN plan disagreement + WAL syncMode validation + LIMIT subquery
queue.summary: Planned 3 bug fixes: WAL syncMode validation (throw on bad values), EXPLAIN classic cost comparison (align with Volcano), LIMIT subquery evaluation. Prior knowledge: failures.md consulted.

queue.task: Fix WAL syncMode validation: throw on unrecognized values + add test
queue.summary: Added WAL syncMode validation. Invalid values now throw descriptive error. Test added (9/9 pass).

queue.task: Fix EXPLAIN classic planner: add cost comparison for index vs seq scan + test
queue.summary: Fixed EXPLAIN classic planner: added cost comparison for index vs seq scan. Index only chosen when cheaper. 37/37 tests pass.

queue.task: Fix LIMIT subquery: evaluate subquery at execution time + test
queue.summary: Fixed LIMIT subquery: stored limitExpr during parse, resolved at execution in selectInner(). Works with scalar subqueries and cross-table lookups. 48/48 sql tests pass.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard, check PRs
queue.summary: Git pushed all changes. Dashboard healthy.

queue.task: Mid-day reflection. Assess progress, consider blog or monkey-lang CI.
queue.summary: 9 tasks done in ~50 min. Bug batch done early. Next: monkey-lang CI (quick), then more TODO bugs before blog post. Blog can cover all fixes.

queue.goal: monkey-lang: Add CI workflow + update README with current stats
queue.summary: Plan: CI workflow + README update. 894 tests, all passing. 2 BUILD tasks created.

queue.task: Create CI workflow (.github/workflows/ci.yml) for monkey-lang
queue.summary: Created .github/workflows/ci.yml — runs tests on Node 20+22 for push/PR.

queue.task: Update monkey-lang README with test count + CI badge
queue.summary: Updated README with CI badge + 894 test count. Push blocked by workflow scope — needs manual push or token update.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard update
queue.summary: Workspace pushed. monkey-lang push pending (workflow scope).

queue.task: Afternoon direction check. Most impactful remaining work?
queue.summary: Cleaned TODO (removed 4 done items). Next: TRUE/FALSE booleans + REGEXP (quick wins, good blog content), then blog post.

queue.task: Fix TRUE/FALSE as boolean keywords + test
queue.summary: Fixed TRUE/FALSE as boolean literals in SELECT. SELECT TRUE now returns boolean true instead of string. 50/50 sql tests pass.

queue.task: Add REGEXP operator support + test
queue.summary: Added REGEXP/RLIKE operator. Supports column REGEXP pattern, NOT REGEXP, RLIKE alias. Invalid regex handled gracefully. 51/51 sql tests pass.

queue.goal: HenryDB blog post update — 167 features, 4288 tests, architecture
queue.summary: Plan: blog post with updated stats (369 src files, 873 test files, ~8172 tests, 207K LOC). 2 BUILD tasks: write + proofread.

queue.task: Write HenryDB blog post — 369 source files, 8172 tests, architecture + bug stories + lessons
queue.summary: Wrote HenryDB blog post (~2000 words). Covers architecture, silent data loss bug, feature combinations, vectorized execution, WAL, query optimizer, lessons. Committed.

queue.task: Proofread and commit blog post
queue.summary: Proofread blog post. Minor grammar fix. Committed and pushed.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, final afternoon commit
queue.summary: All pushed.

queue.task: Research: allocation sinking / escape analysis for JIT
queue.summary: EXPLORE: Escape analysis exists in monkey-lang but results unused. Closures are always heap-allocated. Documented implementation plan for stack-allocated closures (3 phases). All 3 hypotheses confirmed.

queue.task: Deep dive: HenryDB query optimizer gaps — cost model unification
queue.summary: EXPLORE: Found 4 optimizer gaps. (1) Dual cost model: classic uses hardcoded selectivity, Volcano uses stats. (2) No INLJ. (3) No subquery decorrelation. (4) No CTE materialization. All 3 hypotheses confirmed. Documented in scratch.

queue.task: THINK: Assess which TODO Normal item has best depth-to-effort ratio. Plan next cycle.
queue.summary: Depth check passed (3/3 yes). Next: DATE/TIME modifiers. Saved parseSelectColumn refactor for fresh morning. 18 tasks done so far.
Plan: Extend DATE() with SQLite-compatible modifiers (+N days, -N months, start of month, now). 2 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Implement DATE/TIME modifiers in sql-functions.js (SQLite-compatible) + tests
queue.summary: Added SQLite-compatible DATE modifiers. Supports +N days/months/years, start of month/year/day, now, chained modifiers. 19/19 tests pass.

queue.task: Add TIME() and DATETIME() modifier support + tests
queue.summary: Added TIME() and DATETIME() with modifiers. Handles space-separated timestamps, chained modifiers. 31/31 date/time tests pass.
Plan: 3 tasks — extract selectivity.js, wire into classic planner, add agreement tests. Prior knowledge: scratch/henrydb-optimizer-gaps.md consulted.

queue.task: Extract selectivity estimator into shared src/selectivity.js from volcano-planner.js
queue.summary: Extracted selectivity estimator into shared selectivity.js. Volcano planner now imports from shared module. 9/9 volcano tests pass. No behavior change.

queue.task: Wire shared selectivity into classic planner (query-plan.js)
queue.summary: Wired shared selectivity into classic planner. Now uses ANALYZE stats (ndistinct, histograms) when available. Both planners produce same estimates. 37/37 tests pass.

queue.task: Add tests verifying classic/Volcano plan agreement with ANALYZE stats
queue.summary: Added 12 tests for shared selectivity estimator: heuristic mode, stats-based (ndistinct, histogram), AND/OR, getColumnNdv. All pass.

queue.goal: Add Index Nested Loop Join to join optimizer
queue.summary: INLJ already implemented in join-optimizer.js! costNestedLoopJoin uses index cost when inner.hasIndex(joinCol). Verified: INLJ wins for small outer + large indexed inner. No new work needed.

queue.task: THINK: Plan neural-net training tutorial structure
queue.summary: Tutorial structure: 8 sections from matrices to digit classification. Focus on beginner-friendly explanations with runnable code. Switched project from HenryDB to neural-net for variety.
Plan: 2 tasks — write tutorial with runnable examples, verify examples work.

queue.task: Write neural-net training tutorial (docs/tutorial.md) with runnable examples
queue.summary: Wrote neural-net training tutorial (~2000 words, 8 sections). Covers matrices → forward pass → backprop → training loop → examples. All code examples use actual API.

queue.task: Verify tutorial code examples actually run
queue.summary: Verified all tutorial examples run. Fixed getRow→slice(). XOR converges, sin(x) loss=0.0003. Pushed.

queue.task: EXPLORE: Stress test monkey-lang RISC-V backend with edge cases
queue.summary: EXPLORE: Stress tested monkey-lang VM. Everything works: nested closures, recursion, higher-order funcs, eval/VM parity (9/9). Found README discrepancy (claims WASM+RISC-V backends that dont exist). Mutable closure state unsupported (by design). 0/3 hypotheses confirmed — system is more robust than expected.

queue.task: Fix monkey-lang README: remove claims about WASM and RISC-V backends that dont exist
queue.summary: Fixed monkey-lang README: removed false claims about WASM and RISC-V backends, pattern matching, generators. Accurate docs.
